title: Fluorescein Serial Dilution (1:2)荧光素梯度稀释
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"yvfnf","text":"This protocol performs an automated 1:2 serial dilution of fluorescein across columns 1–11 of a 96-well plate using the Opentrons Flex robot. It is designed for calibrating plate reader fluorescence.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8lqqg","text":"Flexibility: Supports 1–8 parallel replicates.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":12}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d6ber","text":"Smart Pipetting: Automatically selects between 1-channel (for \u003c8 samples) and 8-channel pipettes (for 8 samples).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d70l2","text":"Outcome: Columns 1–11 contain the dilution series; Column 12 serves as a PBS blank.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"6oqlk","text":"Labware Definitions: Ensure the labware placed on the deck exactly matches the definitions in the Python protocol (96_wellplate_360ul_flat and nest_12_reservoir_15ml). Using different labware dimensions may result in crashes or inaccurate pipetting.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":20}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"32oce","text":"Pipette Calibration: Verify that the pipettes (Flex 1-channel and 8-channel) are calibrated and the deck calibration is up to date.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":20}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aljgi","text":"Dead Volume: Always add slightly more reagent than calculated to account for the reservoir dead volume (recommend adding +500 µL extra).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":12}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4t7e9","text":"Tip Usage: The protocol assumes a full tip rack at the start. If using a partially used rack, ensure columns 1, 2, and the necessary columns for dilution are present.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"tqkm","text":"Power On: Switch on the Opentrons Flex and connect via the Opentrons App.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"djsv5","text":"Trash Check: Ensure the Trash Bin in Slot A3 is empty and properly installed.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":12}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4tr37","text":"Tip Loading: Place a full 200 µL tip rack in Slot C2.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":12}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cmjj4","text":"Plate Loading: Place a clean, empty Corning 96-well flat-bottom plate in Slot B2.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":14}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"75m85","text":"Reagent Loading: Fill the NEST 12-well reservoir in Slot B3:","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e592k","text":"Well A1: Add at least 2.5 mL of Fluorescein (1X Stock).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":1,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3ldr3","text":"Well A2: Add at least 12 mL of PBS (Diluent).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":1,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9q1ni","text":"Lighting: If possible, dim the room lights or cover the reservoir to prevent photobleaching of the fluorescein before the run starts.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"1ckb6","text":"Light Sensitivity: Fluorescein is light-sensitive. Prolonged exposure to bright light can affect fluorescence readings. Analyze the plate immediately after the protocol finishes.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9la1u","text":"Collision Risk: Do not place any tall labware in unused slots (A1, B1, D1, D2) that might interfere with the gantry movement.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":15}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cv7ng","text":"Liquid Waste: The protocol discards liquid into the trash bin. Ensure the bin liner is not leaking.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: This protocol performs an automated 1:2 serial dilution of fluorescein across columns 1–11 of a 96-well plate using the Opentrons Flex robot. It is designed for calibrating plate reader fluorescence. Flexibility: Supports 1–8 parallel replicates. Smart Pipetting: Automatically selects between 1-channel (for <8 samples) and 8-channel pipettes (for 8 samples). Outcome: Columns 1–11 contain the dilution series; Column 12 serves as a PBS blank.

Reagents: Fluorescein (1X Stock Solution) PBS (Phosphate Buffered Saline, 1X) Labware (Opentrons Definitions): Corning 96 Well Plate 360 µL Flat (corning_96_wellplate_360ul_flat) NEST 12 Well Reservoir 15 mL (nest_12_reservoir_15ml) Opentrons Flex 96 Tip Rack 200 µL (opentrons_flex_96_tiprack_200ul) Equipment: Opentrons Flex Robot Flex 1-Channel Pipette 1000 µL (Mount: Left) Flex 8-Channel Pipette 1000 µL (Mount: Right)
Section 1: Deck & Reagent Setup Step 1: Deck Layout Place the labware on the Opentrons Flex deck as defined below: %s %s
Step 2: Reagent Preparation (Reservoir B3) Fill the NEST 12-well reservoir (Slot B3) as follows: Well A1: Fluorescein 1X Stock (Min. 2 mL) Well A2: PBS 1X (Diluent) (Min. 10 mL)

Step 3: Protocol Parameters Load the Python protocol. Set the parallel_samples parameter (Runtime Parameter): 1–7 samples: Robot uses Left Mount (1-channel pipette). 8 samples: Robot uses Right Mount (8-channel pipette).

Step 4: Phase 1 – Plate Preparation (Automated) The robot will perform the following actions automatically: Add Diluent: Dispense 100 µL PBS into Columns 2–12. Note: Uses new tips per column. Add Sample: Dispense 200 µL Fluorescein Stock into Column 1.

Step 5: Phase 2 – Serial Dilution (Automated) The robot performs the 1:2 dilution series: Transfer: Aspirate 100 µL from Col 1 → Dispense to Col 2. Mix & Propagate Mix 3 times (150 µL volume). Transfer 100 µL to the next column. Repeat until Column 11. Final Step: After mixing Column 11, aspirate 100 µL and discard into Trash (A3). Result: Column 12 remains pure PBS (Blank).

Tip Usage: Ensure the tip rack at C2 is full before starting. The protocol consumes 1 column of tips for PBS, 1 column for Fluorescein, and 1 column (or single tips) for the dilution series. Liquid Waste: Ensure the Trash Bin is installed at A3. Calibration: Ensure the robot deck calibration is up to date, especially for the 96-well plate, to avoid tip collision during mixing.
creator: Gao Yuan
